claim: The manuscript's text structure reflects a mix of prose and verse, with the herbal section being primarily composed of short, rhyming couplets.
evidence_for: Higher hapax legomena ratio in the herbal section (70.1%) compared to other sections
Glyph positional constraints may reflect poetic structure rather than prose
evidence_against: Word length distribution is similar across all sections
test: Compare word length distributions between the herbal and other sections using a two-sample K-S test
